subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy sublime letter hath reached me, and its meanings have become the cause of joy and gladness, for they bear witness to [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه عالی واصل و معانی سبب سرور و شادمانی گشت چه که دلیل بر
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual transformation
